name: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc.
business: F&G is a leading provider of insurance solutions serving retail annuity and life customers as well as institutional clients. It markets a broad portfolio of annuities including fixed indexed annuities, registered index-linked annuities, multi-year guarantee annuities, pension risk transfer solutions, indexed universal life insurance, and institutional funding agreements. The company serves approximately 778,000 policyholders and 145,000 plan participants as of December 31, 2025.
sellsTo: institutional clients (pension risk transfer, funding agreement investors)
independent agents and financial advisors through IMOs, banks, and broker-dealers

exposures.sentence: F&G is a leading provider of insurance solutions serving retail annuity and life customers as well as institutional clients.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. retirement market opportunity includes $5.8 trillion of mutual fund 401(k) assets, $800 billion of U.S. consumer savings and the $447 billion retail life and annuities market.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. retirement market opportunity is vast and includes $5.8 trillion of mutual fund 401(k) assets, $800 billion of U.S. consumer savings and the $447 billion retail life and annuities market.
In addition to our funding agreement business with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Atlanta, ( FHLB ), we originate Funding Agreement Backed Notes ( FABN ), a $276 billion market.

tamClaims.claim: The PRT market is $45 billion (of $3 trillion total private defined benefit plan assets).
tamClaims.sentence: We also offer PRT solutions to a $45 billion (of $3 trillion total private defined benefit plan assets) market.

tamClaims.claim: The fixed index annuity market grew from nearly $12 billion of sales in 2002 to $130 billion of sales in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: For example, the fixed index annuity ( FIA ) market grew from nearly $12 billion of sales in 2002 to $130 billion of sales in 2024 and the registered index-linked annuities ( RILA ) market grew from $17 billion of sales in 2019 to $62 billion of sales in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: The registered index-linked annuities market grew from $17 billion of sales in 2019 to $62 billion of sales in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: For example, the fixed index annuity ( FIA ) market grew from nearly $12 billion of sales in 2002 to $130 billion of sales in 2024 and the registered index-linked annuities ( RILA ) market grew from $17 billion of sales in 2019 to $62 billion of sales in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: The IUL market expanded from $100 million of annual sales in 2002 to $2 billion of annual sales in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Additionally, this market demand has positively impacted the IUL market as it has expanded from $100 million of annual sales in 2002 to $2 billion of annual sales in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: More than 11,000 Americans turn 65 every day.
tamClaims.sentence: We serve a growing retirement population, with more than 11,000 Americans turning 65 every day and a projected 30% increase in people age 65-100 over the next 25 years according to the U.S. Census Bureau.
